title: Bitbucket の 503 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: Bitbucket Pipelines plan details (build minutes and concurrency) are outdated and inaccurate in the provided article excerpt.
One troubleshooting claim regarding SSL/TLS errors and 503 lacks a direct, Bitbucket-specific primary source, relying on general web knowledge instead.
one or more claims are unsupported or unverifiable
required_actions: Update Bitbucket Pipelines plan minutes (Free: 50min, Standard: 2,500min, Premium: 3,500min) and concurrent step limits (Free: up to 10) with current official documentation from Atlassian.

Either find a direct Bitbucket-specific source for the claim about old git/curl versions causing 503 due to SSL/TLS verification failure or rephrase it as a general troubleshooting tip, explicitly stating it's not a Bitbucket-specific 503 cause.
Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.

sources.title: Limitations of Bitbucket Pipelines - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: Bitbucket Pipelinesの各プランには、月間ビルド時間と同時実行ステップ数に制限があります。例えば、無料プランは月間50分、Standardプランは月間2,500分、Premiumプランは月間3,500分のビルド時間が含まれます。無料プランの同時実行ステップは最大10です。
